name: The Shadowmere Hermit
description: A rickety hut built on stilts above the black swamp water. A strange, pungent incense smoke drifts from the windows.

discovery.message: You find a series of wooden poles marked with bone charms leading toward a secluded hut.

hut-exterior.text: The wooden stairs are slippery with swamp moss. An old, blind woman sits on the porch, brewing a bubbling cauldron.

choices.label: [Perception 15] Discreetly search the crates on the porch.
Offer a Flask of Oil to help her fire.

hermit-dialogue.text: 'I smell the dust of the road on you, traveler,' the woman rasps. 'The swamp takes many, but perhaps you have something to trade for my wisdom?'

choices.label: [Charisma 14] I seek knowledge of the Sunken Temple.
What do you have for trade?

temple-lore.text: 'Ah, the temple... it hungers. Take this. It might help you breathe where the water is thick.'

hermit-shop.text: She reveals a collection of strange herbs and concoctions.

porch-search.text: You find a hidden compartment containing rare swamp herbs and a curious glass vial.

oil-offering.text: She nods in appreciation as the cauldron flares bright blue. 'You have a kind heart for a stranger. Take this charm.'
